post.description:
Revoke the current access token (and optionally the refresh token).

Requires a valid access token in the Authorization header.

put.description: Change a user's password. Admin only.

get.description: List available agent binaries for download. No auth required.
Download an agent binary by filename. No auth required.

Return full task list assigned to this agent. Requires access_key header.

Agent calls this after register + NATS subscribe to get initial tasks,
and can re-call periodically as a fallback if NATS messages are missed.

post.description: Push update notification to all matching-platform agents.
Create a new probe task. Admin only.

get.description: Get a single task by UUID. No auth required.

delete.description: Deactivate a task (soft delete). Admin only.

post.description: Assign a task to agents by their UUIDs. Admin only.

schema.title: Response Assign Task Endpoint Api V1 Tasks  Task Uuid  Assign Post

get.description: Get agents assigned to a task. No auth required.

schema.title: Response Get Task Agents Endpoint Api V1 Tasks  Task Uuid  Agents Get

delete.description: Unassign an agent from a task. Admin only.

schema.title: Response Dashboard Stats Api V1 Dashboard Stats Get

post.description: Create a new alert rule. Subscriber or admin.

get.description: List alert rules. Admin sees all; subscriber sees own only.
Get a single alert rule by UUID.

patch.description: Update an alert rule. Own only (or admin).

delete.description: Deactivate an alert rule (soft delete). Own only (or admin).

get.description: List alert events. Admin sees all; subscriber sees events for own rules only.
Get a single alert event by UUID.

post.description: Create a new webhook. Secret is returned only once.

get.description: List webhooks. Admin sees all; subscriber sees own only.
Get a single webhook by UUID. Own only (or admin).

patch.description: Update a webhook. Own only (or admin).

delete.description: Deactivate a webhook (soft delete). Own only (or admin).

post.description: Send a test ping event to the webhook and return the delivery result.
Generate a new HMAC secret for the webhook. Old secret is invalidated.

get.description: List recent delivery attempts for a webhook (newest first).

schema.title: Response Bulk Update Settings Endpoint Api V1 Settings Bulk Patch
